verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jehovah is your name Jehovah is your name Jehovah is your name Jehovah is your name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Mighty warrior Great in battle Jehovah is your name Mighty warrior Great in battle Jehovah is your name

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are a mighty warrior (Mighty warrior) An you are so great (Great in battle) Jehovah is your name
